name: 18"x14" Sailboat Wall Art - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Bring a touch of oceanic vibe to your decor with the 18"x14" Sailboat Wall Art from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Crafted on a block print medium, this art piece features a gold-toned sailboat, perfectly framed for a polished look. The compact horizontal design fits seamlessly into various spaces, adding a serene ocean-inspired charm to your home instantly.

Threshold™ designed w/Studio Mcgee: Looks like home, feels like you.
